tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8) jednym wyrazem, przeksztalcajac wyrazy podane w ramce tak, aby otrzymac logiczny i gramatycznie poprawny tekst. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.title: THE ROAD TO VICTORY
tasks.text: Becoming a sports champion requires years of hard work and dedication. Every 1.1. ________ athlete follows a strict daily routine. Their 1.2. ________ begins early in the morning and often lasts for many hours. The biggest 1.3. ________ in any sport is winning an Olympic gold medal. Athletes need both physical 1.4. ________ and mental focus to succeed. During important 1.5. ________, thousands of fans cheer with great 1.6. ________. Sometimes players suffer painful 1.7. ________ that keep them away from the game for months. However, true champions never lose their 1.8. ________ in themselves and always come back stronger than before.
